Farmer Network

The hands behind
every harvest.

Vera Heritage partners with certified ube farmers across Bohol, Batangas, Benguet, and beyond. Track provenance, harvest data, quality grades, and farmer impact — in real time.

Premium Heritage (Kinampay)

Click a region

Select any marker on the map to explore farmers, harvest data, variety and quality details for that region.

🏝️
Bohol Province
Central Visayas — Premium Heritage Zone
⭐ Top Tier
Farmers
18
Variety
Kinampay
2025 Yield
6,200 kg
Grade
A / Premium
Farmgate Price
₱120–150/kg
Harvest Season
Nov–Dec
★★★★★
Quality Score: 98/100 — Unmatched aroma, deep violet, zero fillers

Bohol Kinampay is Vera Heritage's flagship variety — the only true Philippine heirloom ube with documented genetic provenance. Ideal volcanic soil conditions, centuries of cultivation knowledge, and our highest direct farmgate premium program make this region the gold standard.

COA Certified HACCP Compliant Golden Seal
🌋
Batangas Province
Luzon — Heritage Kinampay Region
Grade A
Farmers
9
Variety
Kinampay
2025 Yield
2,800 kg
Grade
A
Farmgate Price
₱100–130/kg
Harvest Season
Nov–Jan
★★★★☆
Quality Score: 91/100 — Strong aroma, good pigmentation

Batangas is one of the Philippines' oldest Kinampay cultivation zones. Rich volcanic soil from Taal influences the flavor profile, producing ube with a distinctive sweetness profile sought after by halaya and jam producers.

🏔️
Benguet — Cordillera
Mountain Province, Luzon — Highland Ube
Grade A
Farmers
7
Variety
Cordillera Ube
2025 Yield
1,600 kg
Grade
A
Farmgate Price
₱90–110/kg
Altitude
1,400–1,800m
★★★★☆
Quality Score: 88/100 — High starch, earthy notes

High-altitude cultivation in Benguet produces ube with distinctive earthy, slightly nutty flavor notes. Lower moisture content makes it particularly suitable for powder production with excellent shelf stability.

🌿
Quezon Province
Southern Luzon — Volume Production
Grade B
Farmers
6
Variety
Standard Cultivar
2025 Yield
2,100 kg
Grade
B
Farmgate Price
₱60–80/kg
Harvest Season
Nov–Jan
★★★☆☆
Quality Score: 78/100 — Good volume, standard quality

Quezon is our volume production region, providing Grade B ube powder for mid-tier buyers and blended products. All farms are certified under our partner program.

🌺
Leyte Province
Eastern Visayas — Emerging Premium Zone
Grade A
Farmers
5
Variety
Leyte Ube
2025 Yield
900 kg
Grade
A
Farmgate Price
₱95–115/kg
Processing
Tunga Facility
★★★★☆
Quality Score: 86/100 — Emerging quality, scaling fast

Leyte is an emerging premium region with a new 50M-peso processing plant in Tunga providing local value-adding capacity. Vera Heritage is one of the first partners using this facility for export-grade processing.

🌄
Mindanao (Bukidnon)
Northern Mindanao — Upland Cultivation
Grade B+
Farmers
3
Variety
Mindanao Ube
2025 Yield
600 kg
Grade
B+
Farmgate Price
₱70–90/kg
Altitude
700–1,200m
★★★☆☆
Quality Score: 82/100 — Developing program

Bukidnon's highland climate produces a good-quality ube with strong starch content. This region is in our farmer development program — we're investing in soil improvement and training for the next harvest cycle.

🌴
Palawan — Prospecting Region

Palawan is currently in our prospecting phase. Soil surveys and test plots are underway. Potential for unique micro-climate varieties.

🗻
Luzon Region

Click a specific marker (BTG for Batangas, BNG for Benguet, QZN for Quezon) to see detailed regional data.

🏝️
Visayas Region

The Visayas hosts our top-tier Bohol Kinampay operations plus partner farms on Leyte. Click BOHOL or LYT markers for specifics.

Harvest Calendar

Annual harvest & supply cycle

Philippine ube peaks November–December. Vera Heritage uses cold storage and processing to extend availability year-round.

Jan
800
Feb
—
Mar
—
Apr
—
May
—
Jun
—
Jul
Planting
Aug
Growing
Sep
Growing
Oct
Early
Nov
PEAK
Dec
HIGH
Peak Harvest
Active Harvest
Off-Season (Cold Stock)
💡
Year-round supply through cold storage & processing
Unlike most Philippine suppliers who only sell during November–December, Vera Heritage maintains year-round availability via our cold storage network in Bohol and Manila, and IQF-frozen puree stock that ships any month.

Are You a Farmer?

Join the Vera Heritage
farmer partner program.

Premium prices, co-op dividends, technical support, and real-time market visibility. We're actively recruiting ube farmers across the Philippines.
